job_description:
Sr. B2B Content Specialist

2Base Technologies is at a deliberate stage of building its marketing function, and this role owns the written voice of that function end to end. We are a technology services company with over 15 years of delivery experience, working with mid-market and enterprise clients across the United States and the United Kingdom. Our work spans AI implementation, custom software development, legacy system modernisation, and operational transformation.

What This Role Exists to Do

This is a senior writing role with a specific, demanding purpose. It is not a content management or social media role. If that distinction is unclear, this is probably not the right fit.

  • Operationalise and enforce the company's written voice across all content: long-form SEO content, leadership-authored professional publishing, and all external written output.
  • Target technical leaders (CTOs, IT Directors) and business decision-makers (Founders, COOs) who evaluate technology decisions.
  • Maintain technical credibility and commercial relevance while balancing complexity for diverse audiences.

What You Will Own

  • All long-form content: pillar pages, blogs, playbooks, decision frameworks, and use-case libraries.
  • Content written in the voice of senior leadership for professional platforms.
  • Auditing and enforcing brand standards for all published content.
  • Writing clear content briefs for junior team members to execute efficiently.
  • Acting as the content quality gate—no content is published without your approval.
  • Using AI tools as a productivity layer, not a substitute for original thinking.

What You Will Not Own

  • SEO keyword selection (handled by the SEO Specialist).
  • Social media scheduling (managed by another team member).
  • Visual design of content assets (owned by the Visual Designer).
  • Distribution strategy (decided by the Marketing & Growth Lead).
  • ICP definition (you write for the defined ICP).

Requirements

  • 3–5 years of B2B content experience, with 5–6 years preferred.
  • Proven content that ranked on Google, not just published.
  • Experience writing in executive/leadership voices.
  • Working knowledge of SEO (search intent, content alignment).
  • Experience with AI writing tools, understanding their value and limitations.
  • Demonstrable content that contributed to measurable outcomes (traffic, leads, engagement).
  • Background in technology, SaaS, or professional services preferred.

Writing Ability

  • Write with a clear point of view, not neutral summaries.
  • Explain complex technical concepts in plain language without losing credibility.
  • Write concisely with no filler or unnecessary qualification.
  • Adapt to multiple voices authentically.

Mindset

  • Treat content as a commercial tool, not a creative exercise.
  • Comfortable with feedback and not taking it personally.
  • Genuinely curious about AI, technology, and business operations.
  • Fast-paced: this team moves quickly and cannot wait for delayed drafts.

What We Are Not Looking For

  • Portfolios of generic "Top 10 Tips" or trend summaries with no original thinking.
  • Writers who cannot explain performance metrics of their content.
  • Candidates without experience writing for technical or senior business audiences.
  • Writers who only produce self-directed content and lack brief adherence.
  • Candidates who treat AI tools as the primary author with minimal editing.

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Senior B2B Content Specialist responsible for operationalizing and enforcing a technical company's written voice across long-form content for enterprise audiences. Requires 3–5 years of experience with SEO and AI tool proficiency.

job_description:

This role is not about optimizing existing content. It defines what gets written, why, and how to ensure the right audience finds it at the right decision stage. The organic search function at 2Base aims to generate qualified inbound pipeline at scale in the US and UK markets. This requires: - A large volume of high-intent pages - A technical foundation for performance - A programmatic architecture that compounds over time

This is a strategic and technical role, not an SEO support or content execution position.

What You Will Own

  • Organic traffic strategy for US/UK markets, including keyword targeting and architecture

Mindset

  • System-thinking for compounding organic growth

What We Are Not Looking For

Apply: Share your resume at careers@2basetechnologies.com.

job_description:
About 2Base Technologies

2Base Technologies is building its marketing function from scratch, and this role makes it look like a company worth taking seriously. We are a technology services company with over 15 years of delivery experience, working with mid-market and enterprise clients across the United States and the United Kingdom. Our work spans AI implementation, custom software development, legacy system modernisation, and operational transformation.

What This Role Exists to Do

Before a CTO reads a word of our content, they see the design. Before they trust the argument, they have already made a judgment about whether this company looks credible. This role owns that first impression and every asset that follows. The visual function at 2Base is being built from the ground up with no existing brand system, template library, or consistent visual identity. Your priority in the first 30 days is to build the brand system, which will serve as the foundation for all subsequent assets (e.g., LinkedIn carousels, ad creatives, landing pages, presentation templates).

This is not a creative agency role. The audience is skeptical, senior, and technically literate. Restraint, precision, and consistency matter more than visual novelty.

What You Will Own

  • The 2Base visual brand system (color palette, typography, spacing, layout rules, and documentation)
  • Marketing/content visual assets (LinkedIn carousels, social graphics, infographics, diagrams)
  • Paid advertising creatives (Google Display, LinkedIn Ads) designed for testing and iteration
  • Landing page visual design (layout, components, conversion-focused structure)
  • Email/presentation/sales deck templates
  • A template library for independent on-brand asset creation
  • Design consistency auditing
  • Secondary responsibility: light video editing for social reels, YouTube, and website use

What You Will Not Own

  • Messaging or content (owned by the Content and Thought Leadership Specialist)
  • Copywriting
  • Website development
  • Content strategy
  • Brand positioning

Requirements

  • Minimum 3 to 5 years in a B2B design role (technology, SaaS, or professional services preferred)
  • Experience building or evolving a brand system
  • LinkedIn design experience (carousels, document posts, single-image content)
  • Paid ad creative experience (executed, tested, and iterated)
  • Landing page design with conversion principles
  • Basic video editing for social/web content
  • Proficiency in Figma (non-negotiable) and Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects)
  • Portfolio demonstrating clean, structured, and purposeful design
  • Ability to explain design decisions and align with senior B2B audiences

What We Are Not Looking For

  • Portfolios dominated by consumer brands, lifestyle work, or event design
  • Candidates who cannot justify design decisions
  • Designers without brand system-building experience
  • Overcomplicated visuals with excessive fonts/colors/styles

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

Contact

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.

job_description:

  • API testing (Postman)
  • Test management tools (Jira)
  • Test documentation creation
  • SQL/database validation

  • Participate in requirement discussions to understand business objectives, functional flows, dependencies, and assumptions before documentation
  • Analyze requirements to identify gaps, ambiguities, and inconsistencies, and work with Core BAs to resolve them
  • Document functional flows, business rules, and acceptance criteria where applicable to support development and QA teams
  • Document wireframes, UI flows, validations, and UI specifications in collaboration with design and product teams
  • Maintain change logs, version history, and document updates throughout the project lifecycle
  • Create and manage traceability matrices linking business, functional, and technical requirements
  • Maintain cross-references across BRD, SRS, UI, API, and related documentation
  • Ensure documentation consistency, completeness, and alignment with approved scope and delivery timelines
  • Ensure accurate and timely PMS updates with structured documentation details
  • Support development, QA, UAT, and audit processes through clear, traceable, and up-to-date documentation
  • Assist in requirement reviews, walkthroughs, and validation sessions with internal and client stakeholders

Required Skills and Experience

  • 1 to 3 years of experience in Business Analysis or related roles
  • Strong experience in BRD and SRS creation
  • Hands-on experience with documentation templates, standards, and version control
  • Ability to document UI wireframes and functional flows clearly
  • Working knowledge of APIs and system integrations for documentation purposes
  • Experience with project management systems and documentation tools
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple documents in parallel

job_description:
About the Job

As a specialist in electronics and software for the past 20 years, in-tech is a dynamic, fast-growing engineering company headquartered in Munich, Germany, employing around 2,350 employees globally across 20 project locations in 8 countries. in-tech develops innovative engineering solutions for the automotive, rail, aerospace, defence, and industrial sectors. We are committed to a flexible, modern work culture and work-life balance. Our colour orange stands for liveliness, warmth, and dynamism. We value a strong team spirit, fresh ideas, and a positive work culture—what we call the Orange Spirit!

Since 2024, in-tech has become a subsidiary of Infosys Ltd. This strategic partnership enables us to offer our customers even more comprehensive development and digitalisation services and a greater offshore capability. We are seeking an experienced AI Developer to join our team in Kochi or Bangalore with hybrid work options. The role involves leading the design, development, and deployment of cutting-edge AI, Generative AI, and Agentic-AI solutions for enterprise customers.

Responsibilities

  • Design, plan, and implement AI, Generative AI, and Agentic-AI architectures for customer projects
  • Develop custom end-to-end GenAI and LLM-based solutions using frameworks like LangChain, LangGraph, AutoGen, HuggingFace, and OpenAI APIs
  • Implement and operate machine learning systems using TensorFlow, PyTorch, and modern LLM/ML tooling
  • Build and manage cloud-based AI ecosystems on AWS, Azure, or GCP, including architecture design and platform operations
  • Apply DevOps/MLOps and LLMOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and model deployment workflows
  • Collaborate closely with enterprise architects, engineering teams, and C-level stakeholders to align AI roadmaps and solution strategies
  • Evaluate and introduce new AI technologies, frameworks, and agentic tools to expand the organization’s (Gen)AI capabilities
  • Lead the technical execution of proof-of-concepts (PoCs) in an agile environment
  • Provide strategic consulting on cloud-native, scalable, and secure AI platform architectures

Requirements

  • Degree in (Business) Computer Science, Engineering, or a comparable technical field
  • 5+ years of experience as a Solutions Architect or Enterprise Architect in cloud/data environments
  • Proven experience developing and integrating LLM or Generative AI solutions into production systems
  • Hands-on project experience designing complex cloud architectures on AWS, Azure, or GCP
  • Strong knowledge of AI/ML development with Python and major ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, HuggingFace)
  • Practical experience with agentic AI frameworks (LangGraph, AutoGen) and LLM orchestration tools
  • Experience with MLOps, DevOps, and container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes); familiarity with CI/CD for ML models
  • Understanding of architecture frameworks and agile methods (Scrum, Kanban)
  • Excellent English communication skills
  • Willingness to travel, depending on project requirements

job_description:
Sr. Business Analyst

At 2Base, we are rebuilding the Business Analyst function into a world-class, product-minded, clarity-driven team. This role is not a documentation role. It is not a screen updater role. It is not a support role. This is a core Business Analyst position responsible for functional modelling, system reasoning, requirement clarity, and building the foundation for correct development.

Key Responsibilities - Lead requirement workshops, client calls, and discovery discussions to understand business needs clearly. - Ask deeper questions, challenge assumptions, and validate the true business intent behind every requirement. - Convert ambiguous client inputs into structured, logical, and actionable functional understanding. - Break large features into modules, workflows, components, and clear dependencies. - Build strong system-level understanding involving APIs, integrations, data flow, and backend considerations. - Translate business processes into functional logic that development teams can execute. - Decompose requirements into use-case flows, system behaviours, edge cases, alternate paths, validation rules, and dependencies. - Prepare high-quality documentation, including BRD, FRD, SRS, workflows, state diagrams, data-flow diagrams, API requirement specs, and acceptance criteria. - Ensure all documentation is clear, logical, structured, testable, and ready for developers and QA to use. - Collaborate closely with developers, architects, QA, and product owners to validate feasibility and align understanding. - Ensure QA teams can derive test cases effectively from your functional logic and acceptance criteria. - Communicate confidently with clients, handle requirement discussions smoothly, and clarify misunderstandings immediately. - Push back politely on unclear or changing requirements and ensure final decisions are documented properly. - Maintain requirement traceability throughout the lifecycle and ensure zero ambiguity during handover to development. - Own the entire requirement lifecycle from discovery to development readiness with high accountability. - Drive clarity across teams by ensuring every requirement is complete, validated, and logically consistent.

Required Skills & Experience - Minimum 4+ years of core Business Analyst experience with strong analytical and system-level thinking. - Ability to break down complex requirements into clear components, workflows, and functional logic. - Excellent verbal and written communication with confidence in client interactions and clarifications. - Proven experience in preparing SRS, BRD, FRD, workflows, and acceptance criteria with high clarity. - Ability to challenge assumptions politely, ask the right questions, and ensure zero ambiguity. - Strong collaboration experience with development, QA, architects, and cross-functional teams. - Understanding of API behaviours, integrations, data flows, and multi-module system interactions. - Ability to run requirement discussions, workshops, and independently lead discovery sessions. - Exposure to SaaS, scalable products, automation, or AI-supported systems is an added advantage. - Demonstrated ownership of requirements end-to-end, ensuring developer-ready and testable outputs. - Not suitable for UI-only thinkers, passive communicators, template-based writers, or those relying on AI for answers. - Success is defined by clear, testable requirements, zero rework, strong cross-team alignment, and confident communication. - Candidates must align with 2Base’s structured thinking, clarity-driven culture, and transformation of the BA function.

Minimum Qualifications - Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or related field - 4 to 8 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst - Experience in SaaS or scalable product environments - Exposure to AI/Automation, integrations, or multi-module systems - Ability to run independent client workshops - Must have independently handled requirement ownership for at least one full project lifecycle

Benefits - A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.

Senior Back End Engineer - Node.js

Company: iBoson Innovations (P) Ltd Location: ACE 1, 3rd Floor, CDAC Building, Technopark Campus, Kazhakootam, Thiruvananthapuram, 695581 Website: http://www.iboson.io Closing Date: 12, Apr 2026 Published Date: 06, Apr 2026 Contact Email: career@ibosoninnov.com

About the Role

iBoson is shaping the future of AR and AI. We’re growing our engineering team and seeking a skilled Node.js Developer to design and scale backend systems that power cutting-edge, next-gen products.

Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services using Node.js
  • Build and maintain RESTful APIs (and/or GraphQL)
  • Optimize application performance, security, and reliability
  • Design and manage databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, etc.)
  • Collaborate with frontend, product, and DevOps teams
  • Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
  • Review code and mentor junior engineers
  • Participate in architecture and technical decision-making
  • Troubleshoot and resolve production issues

Preferred Skills & Requirements

  • 5+ years of experience in back-end development, with a focus on Node.js
  • Strong understanding of JavaScript, TypeScript, and asynchronous programming
  • Experience in building and managing RESTful APIs and microservices architecture
  • Proficiency in databases (MongoDB, MySQL, or PostgreSQL)
  • Strong understanding of OOP (Object-Oriented Programming) Concepts
  • Knowledge of authentication and authorization mechanisms (JWT, OAuth)
  • Experience with server-side frameworks like Express.js, Nest.js, or similar
  • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure) is a plus
  • Understanding of Agile methodologies and CI/CD pipelines
  • Exposure to AI integrations in back-end applications is an advantage
  • AR technology exposure is a plus

What We Offer

  • Work-life balance with flexible work timings
  • Opportunity to work on challenging, high-impact projects
  • Learning and career growth opportunities
  • Collaborative and engineering-driven culture

Be part of a team where innovation meets impact. At iBoson, you’ll work with emerging AR and AI technologies, tackle exciting challenges, and grow alongside a passionate, tech-driven team. Interested? Share your resume at career@ibosoninnov.com.

Interested candidates must apply with the subject line: "Telecaller Cum Sales Executive".
